title: Device Home screen - Connection status
scenario: Verify connection status display on Device Home Screen shows 'Connected' with green marker when paired and connected, and 'Disconnected' with red marker when turned off.
steps: Ensure the Headset (HS) is paired with the device.
Turn on the Headset (HS) and confirm it is connected.
Observe the status display on the Device Home Screen.
Verify that the status shows 'Connected' with a green marker.
Observe the status display on the Device Home Screen again.
Verify that the status changes to 'Disconnected' with a red marker.
expected: When HS is paired and connected, status shows 'Connected' with a green marker. When HS is turned off, status changes to 'Disconnected' with a red marker.
